fields.question_id: STAR question identifier and local clip filename stem.
fields.template_id: Question template ID within the category.
fields.question: Rendered natural-language question.
fields.answer_index: Zero-based index of the correct choice in choices.

Interaction_T1.question_template: Which object was [Verb]ed by the person?

Interaction_T2.question_template: What did the person do with the [Obj]?

Interaction_T3.question_template: What did the person do while they were [Contact_Rel] the [Obj]?

Interaction_T4.question_template: What did the person do while they were [Contact_Rel1] the [Obj1] and [Contact_Rel2] the [Obj2]?

Sequence_T1.question_template: Which object did the person [Verb1] after they [Verb2]ed the [Obj2]?

Sequence_T2.question_template: Which object did the person [Verb1] before they [Verb2]ed the [Obj2]?

Sequence_T3.question_template: What happened after the person [Verb1]ed the [Obj1]?

Sequence_T4.question_template: What happened before the person [Verb1]ed the [Obj1]?

Sequence_T5.question_template: What did the person do to the [Obj2] after [Verb1]ing the [Obj1]?

Sequence_T6.question_template: What did the person do to the [Obj2] before [Verb1]ing the [Obj1]?

Prediction_T1.question_template: What will the person do next?

Prediction_T2.question_template: What will the person do next with the [Obj]?

Prediction_T3.question_template: Which object would the person [Verb] next?

Prediction_T4.question_template: Which object would the person [Verb2] next after they [Verb1] the [Obj1]?

Feasibility_T1.question_template: Which other object is possible to be [Verb]ed by the person?

Feasibility_T2.question_template: What else is the person able to do with the [Obj]?

Feasibility_T3.question_template: Which object is possible to be [Verb1]ed when the person is [Spatial_Rel] the [Obj2]?

Feasibility_T4.question_template: What is the person able to do when they are [Spatial_Rel] the [Obj2]?

Feasibility_T5.question_template: Which object is the person able to [Verb1] after [Verb2]ing the [Obj2]?

Feasibility_T6.question_template: What is the person able to do after [Verb1]ing the [Obj1]?
